prompt:
Declaration (in builder format):

DistributedRalph
  .pool(6 implementer on "sonnet-4.6", 1 reviewer on "opus-4.7", max 2 per repo)
  .backlog("fix_plan.md" in "github.com/lambda-run/ops")
      .claim(branch lock, 10m ttl)
      .release(on merge, abandon, or ttl expiry)
  .protocol
      .conflict(last write wins after rebase)
      .escalate(3 rebase conflicts to reviewer pool)
      .gossip("slack:#ralph-bus" on claim, merge, block)
  .loop(while backlog has open tasks)
      .stop_if(budget > $50, kill switch, error rate > 30%)
  .on_crash(release claims, requeue with retry++, max 3 then park for human)
  .observe(claim, commit, fail to "loki")
      .metrics(success rate, p50 task seconds, claim contention)
      .surface(error rate > 20% or queue stuck > 30m)
  .terminate(backlog empty or budget exhausted or human signals done)

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
- DistributedRalph system
- Implementer pool with 6 implementers
- Implementer model set to `sonnet-4.6`
- Reviewer pool with 1 reviewer
- Reviewer model set to `opus-4.7`
- Maximum of 2 agents per repository
- Backlog file set to `fix_plan.md`
- Backlog repository set to `github.com/lambda-run/ops`
- Task claiming uses branch locks
- Claim TTL set to 10 minutes
- Claims release on merge
- Claims release on abandon
- Claims release on TTL expiry
- Conflict protocol uses rebase
- Conflict resolution policy set to last-write-wins after rebase
- Escalate after 3 rebase conflicts
- Escalations go to reviewer pool
- Gossip channel set to `slack:#ralph-bus`
- Gossip emitted on claim
- Gossip emitted on merge
- Gossip emitted on block
- Main loop runs while backlog has open tasks
- Stop if budget exceeds `$50`
- Stop if kill switch is activated
- Stop if error rate exceeds `30%`
- On crash, release claims
- On crash, requeue task
- On crash, increment retry count
- Retry maximum set to 3
- After 3 retries, park task for human
- Observe claim events
- Observe commit events
- Observe fail events
- Observation sink set to `loki`
- Metric tracked: success rate
- Metric tracked: p50 task seconds
- Metric tracked: claim contention
- Surface condition: error rate exceeds `20%`
- Surface condition: queue stuck longer than `30m`
- Terminate when backlog is empty
- Terminate when budget is exhausted
- Terminate when human signals done
